about.title: About me
about.cardContent: I'm a front-end developer with experience in the React/Next.js ecosystem. I work in a hybrid format while pursuing my master's degree. I enjoy applying my knowledge in practice—building real products, not just reading documentation. My goal is to become a full-stack senior developer.

planb.name: Plan b.
planb.description: Beeline subscriber dashboard for the «Plan b.» tariff. Cross-platform web app for Telegram, VK, MAX MiniApp and web.

automir.name: Automir Kotlas
automir.description: Car dealership website with vehicle catalog. Design tokens, semantic tokens with dark mode, carousels, Feature-Sliced Design architecture.

notes.name: Notes
notes.description: Notes app — third learning project after a task tracker and a movie catalog. Focus on patterns and best practices.

dactylo.name: DactyloExpress
dactylo.description: App for conducting fingerprint procedures and an assistant for Russian law enforcement officers.

socialpulse.name: SocialPulse
socialpulse.description: Desktop app for social media group activity analytics.
